name: DynamoDB Point-in-Time Recovery Enabled
description: Ensures DynamoDB tables have Point-in-Time Recovery (PITR) enabled for backup and restore
query: SELECT t._cq_id AS id, t.table_name, t.region FROM aws_dynamodb_tables t LEFT JOIN aws_dynamodb_table_continuous_backups b ON t.table_arn = b.table_arn WHERE b.table_arn IS NULL OR b.continuous_backups_status <> 'ENABLED' OR b.point_in_time_recovery_description NOT ILIKE '%"PointInTimeRecoveryStatus": "ENABLED"%'
remediation: Enable Point-in-Time Recovery on DynamoDB tables via AWS Console or CLI: aws dynamodb update-continuous-backups
